title: EPA v. ASHLAND OIL
text:
EPA Enforcement Case 02-1977-0006: ASHLAND OIL
Type: Civil Judicial Action
Status: Closed
Outcome: Litigated With Penalty
Lead Agency: EPA

Penalties and Costs:
Federal Penalty: $1,000

Laws and Sections Violated:
  CWA: 301: NPDES Discharge without a Permit (Other Unpermitted Discharges)

Defendants:
  ASHLAND OIL

Facilities:
  ASHLAND PETROLEUM CO, 4545 RIVER RD, TONAWANDA, NY

Case Milestones:
  03/09/1977: Enforcement Action Data Entered
  03/09/1977: Referred To Dept Of Justice
  03/09/1977: Referred TO U.S. Attorney
  04/02/1977: Complaint Filed With Court
  07/28/1977: Concluded
  07/28/1977: Final Order Entered
  07/28/1977: Final Order Lodged
  07/28/1979: Enforcement Action Closed

Pollutants:
  NONE

Enforcement Conclusion #1: Consent Decree or Court Order Resolving a Civil Judicial Action
  Name: ASHLAND OIL
